description: codex-supervisor remains the implementation executor. Codex app Automation is an orchestration boundary and must not bypass executor safety gates, issue-lint, fresh GitHub PR facts, local CI, or operator confirmations. It grants no new executor authority and adds no multi-repo orchestration to core.

additiveChanges: Adding new optional fields or new enum values is additive and backward-compatible.
breakingChanges: Removing or renaming a responsibility, prohibited bypass, or non-goal, or changing required semantics, is a breaking change.
compatibilityPolicy.stabilityLimit: This artifact does not claim runtime enforcement beyond the existing codex-supervisor executor safety gates.
